narrative.summary: You're on Yonge Street north of Summerhill, stepping into a converted storefront with dark walls, brass fixtures, and moody lighting that makes everyone look like they're celebrating something. This is Justin Friedlich's first solo venture since Buca—modern cooking with bold, layered flavors that wants you to notice the work behind it. Order the Troublemaker cocktail, expect to spend $60-80 per person, and don't mention birthdays if you want your dessert inscription to stay private.

blocks.title: The Space
blocks.body: You're on a busy stretch of Yonge Street north of Summerhill, where the restaurant sits in a converted storefront with tall windows that let you watch the sidewalk traffic. Inside, the design leans theatrical—dark walls, brass fixtures, and moody lighting that makes everyone look like they're celebrating something. Tables are close enough to feel the energy but far enough that your birthday inscription on the dessert plate stays private.

blocks.title: The Food
blocks.body: The menu runs modern with bold, layered flavours that don't apologize for themselves—the kind of cooking that wants you to notice the work behind it. Order the Troublemaker cocktail (they're serious about their bar program) and settle in for dishes that balance richness with enough acidity to keep you going. Expect to spend $60-80 per person before drinks, more if you're marking an occasion.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Enjoyed and absolutely wonderful evening at this restaurant to celebrate my wife’s birthday. The service was great.  We were greeted by a friendly staff member and taken to our table right away.  The atmosphere was great and decor was fantastic.  Our meals were very flavourful and you definitely have to try the Troublemaker cocktail.  I enjoy it so much that I had to have a second.

When booking the restaurant online I mentioned that it was my wife’s birthday. I did not mention it when I got to the restaurant and they did not forget.  Our dessert had a little inscription wishing her a happy birthday.

Overall our evening was fantastic and we also got a chance to chat with Sash.  He was very humble and easy to approach.

Will definitely be visiting this restaurant on our next special event."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Incredible night at Sash. The service was flawless — warm, attentive, and truly elevated the entire experience. We made a special request for Alaskan king crab, and the kitchen absolutely delivered. It was spectacular — sweet, fresh, and perfectly prepared.Best Alaskan Crab ever !!!

Every dish was beautifully plated and full of flavour, and the atmosphere is vibrant yet elegant. Everyone needs to try this place. One of the best dining experiences in Toronto . A MUST !!!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Chef Sash delivers a beautiful experience with his unique flavors and beautiful presentation.

I had the tuna starter which was prepared with care and elegance.

The steak was juicy and cooked to perfection.

Service was spot on delivering a calm and comforting experience.

Perfect for special occasions and everything in between.

If you want to experience first class dining this is the place."

blocks.title: The Menu
blocks.body:
APPETIZERS
• Cauliflower Mushroom Puree
   Burgundy truffles
• Sash Salad
   Black plums + tomatoes + cucumbers + mizuna + jalapeño + soy vinaigrette
⭐ Blue Fin Tuna Tataki
   Cucumber relish + citrus zest + horseradish + wasabi mayo + soy + coriander
• Prime Steak Tartare
   Watercress + cornichons + mustard + toasted baguette

MAINS
• Sash Smash Burger + Frites
   Chuck + brisket + cheddar + truffle aioli
• Chicken Schnitzel Latke
   Creamy Caesar salad + parmesan dill ranch
⭐ Pan Seared East Coast Halibut
   Stew Marzano tomatoes + fingerling potatoes + roasted scallions + lemon butter
• Spaghettini + Fall Squash
   Squash + organic carrots + valentine radishes + pecorino
• Chicken Supreme — $15
   Wild mushroom + crispy potatoes + truffle jus
⭐ Day Boat Scallops + Parmesan Risotto — $20
   Sugar snap peas + cucumber relish + lemon butter + waterborne greens
• Dover Sole — $30
   Meunière sauce + orange + parsley
